nasb.text: Joseph provided his father and his brothers and all his father’s household with food, according to their little ones.

esv.text: And Joseph provided his father, his brothers, and all his father’s household with food, according to the number of their dependents.

cnv.text: 約瑟照著孩子的數目，用糧食供養他的父親、兄弟們，以及父親的家人。

ccb.text: 约瑟按各家人口提供粮食给父亲、弟兄及其他家人。

csbs.text: 约瑟以孩童人数为基准，供应粮食给他的父亲、他的兄弟们以及他父亲的全家。
